objective: Make the sidebar chat (opened from +layout.svelte via svelte:window keydown) close on Escape while the Command/chat textarea is focused, matching bits-ui Popover dismiss-on-Escape behavior and returning focus/control to the page. Eliminate incorrect early-return logic so global handlers run when the chat is open.

completed_stages.summary: Bootstrapped manifest; identified +layout handleKeyDown early return when showChatWindow blocks Escape.
Plan and acceptance criteria for Escape path reordering and optional ChatWindow follow-up.
Restructured handleKeyDown Escape-first; isJsEnabled gate; blur and preventDefault on close.
Vitest browser + source specs; coverage map AC-01–AC-10; npm run test green.
PASS_WITH_NOTES: AC-08 partial (shortcut matrix), ADR-004 focus-to-trigger optional follow-up.
